name: io.github.sigvardt/linkedin-buddy
title: LinkedIn Buddy MCP Server
description: LinkedIn automation via MCP — inbox, feed, connections, profile, search, jobs, notifications, and safe prepare-and-confirm actions.

environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_BUDDY_EVASION_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Anti-bot evasion level: off, light, moderate (default), aggressive

environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_BUDDY_SELECTOR_LOCALE
environmentVariables.description: LinkedIn UI language for selectors: en (default), da
